title: Nieu-Bethesda to host writers’ retreat at Athol Fugard’s historic home
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"NIEU-BETHESDA NEWS - The Playwright’s House is looking forward to hosting a writers’ retreat from 20 to 24 October.","html":"NIEU-BETHESDA NEWS - The Playwright’s House is looking forward to hosting a writers’ retreat from 20 to 24 October."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"They are inviting writers to step into the inspiring home once owned by world-renowned playwright Athol Fugard for a five-day journey of creativity, culture and connection in the heart of the Karoo."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Writers and developing writers, and even those dreaming of becoming writers, will be able to immerse themselves in writing workshops, readings and discussions.","html":"Writers and developing writers, and even those dreaming of becoming writers, will be able to immerse themselves in writing workshops, readings and discussions."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A rare Athol Fugard film screening will also feature, as well as guided adventures and cultural experiences in this magical and historical Karoo village.","html":"A rare Athol Fugard film screening will also feature, as well as guided adventures and cultural experiences in this magical and historical Karoo village."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This unique retreat offers writers the space to create, reflect and be inspired by both the Karoo landscape and the legacy of Athol Fugard.","html":"This unique retreat offers writers the space to create, reflect and be inspired by both the Karoo landscape and the legacy of Athol Fugard."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Contact [email protected] or visit www.sallycranswick.com to make a booking.Do not miss this chance to write, learn and share in one of South Africa’s most iconic creative spaces.","html":"Contact [email protected] or visit www.sallycranswick.com to make a booking.
Do not miss this chance to write, learn and share in one of South Africa’s most iconic creative spaces."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Nieu-Bethesda to host writers’ retreat at Athol Fugard’s historic home
